node.title: Uber SDE3 interview - Phone Screen + Onsite

topic.title: Uber SDE3 interview - Phone Screen + Onsite

post.content:
Phone Interview: Given a MxN matrix with 1's as borders & 0's as water. Check if 0(water) is blocked or can flow out of boundaries. 

Onsite Interview:
First Round - Architectural
Second Round - Problem Solving - https://leetcode.com/problems/coin-change-2/
Just two rounds? Did your onsite schedule have only 2 rounds?

Were there just 2 technical rounds for onsite?\nFor the phone screen, you need to simply perform dfs from every 0 through paths filled with 0\'s, to see if there is a way out (out of range). Once you\'re done with a 0, you can mark it as visited and not traverse it after.
